title: Batch Upload Files as New Version
excerpt: We are often uploading 10+ files with revision control required. Currently, to create a new version you must do so on an individual basis for each file. This is time consuming and leaves  a lot of room for error. We woul…

posts.author: JacobTBJ (Jacob Kennedy)
posts.cookedHtml: We are often uploading 10+ files with revision control required. Currently, to create a new version you must do so on an individual basis for each file. This is time consuming and leaves a lot of room for error. We would like to upload a group of files as a new version.

posts.author: TFaust (Timo Faust)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is an interesting feature and might be needed for our company in the future, too.

Will watch this topic to see where this goes.
